Calculation.Text: 0 + Count ( FAT Chapter::PrimaryKey ) - Count ( FAT Chapter::Proxy type )

Field.name: Package JSON Old Export
Field.comment: Still in use for old productions

Calculation.Text: Let ( [ json1 = "{" & Case ( ValueCount ( FAT ModifierValue @ Package::Value JSON ) = 0 ; "" ; Substitute ( List ( FAT ModifierValue @ Package::Value JSON ) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "" ); json2 = json1 & Case ( ValueCount ( <Table Missing>::<Field Missing> ) = 0 ; "}" ; Case ( json1="{"; ""; "," ) & Substitute ( List ( <Table Missing>::<Field Missing> ) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "}" ); json3 = JSONSetElement ( json2 ; ["id" ; PrimaryKey ; JSONString ] ; ["context" ; Context ID ; JSONString ] ; ["friendly_id" ; JSON Friendly id ; JSONString ] ; ["parent_id" ; Parent id ; JSONString ] ; ["parent_type" ; "title" ; JSONString ] ; ["type" ; "package" ; JSONString ] ; ["title_txt_id" ; Header txt id ; JSONString ] ; ["sub_title_1_txt_id" ; Sub header 1 txt id ; JSONString ] ; ["sub_title_2_txt_id" ; Sub header 2 txt id ; JSONString ] ; ["tags" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Tag Value @ PK::Tag Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]"; JSONArray ] ; ["number_of_links" ; Number of chapters ; JSONNumber ]; ["sort_index" ; SortIndex ; JSONNumber ]; ["hierarchy_level" ; Hierarchy level ; JSONNumber ]; ["program_type" ; PrettifyDash (Package type id) ; JSONString ]; /* From Title */ ["title" ; FAT Title::JSON friendly id ; JSONString ]; ["client" ; PrettifyDash ( FAT Title::<Field Missing> ) ; JSONString ]; ["original_language" ; FAT Title::Original language code ; JSONString] ; ["original_country" ; FAT Title::Original country code ; JSONString] ; ["original_localisation_code" ; FAT Title::Original localisation code ; JSONString] ; ["installed_languages" ; FAT Title::Original localisation code & ", " & Substitute ( List ( FAT Localisation::Localisation code ) ; ¶ ; ", " ); JSONString] ) ]; JSONFormatElements ( json3 ) )

Field.name: PrimaryKey
Field.comment: Unique identifier of each record in this table

Field.name: CreationTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was created

Field.name: CreatedBy
Field.comment: Account name of the user who created each record

Field.name: ModificationTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was last modified

Field.name: ModifiedBy
Field.comment: Account name of the user who last modified each record

Field.name: JSON Friendly id
Field.comment: Friendly id used in JSON and as Funkis Cloud directory name

Calculation.Text: Case( IsEmpty(TF PK Header::Text) ; "Package-" & Serial ID; TF PK Header::Text)

Field.name: Package Levels
Field.comment: Which levels are available to build - Chapter,Page

Calculation.Text: 0 + Count ( FAT Page::PrimaryKey ) - Count(FAT Page::Proxy type)

Field.name: GitLab Project code URL
Field.comment: URL to the project on GitLab - for download, build and publish functionality. Leave empty for BaseProject URL

Field.name: Reference name
Field.comment: The reference name - used in friendly id

Validation.Message: You must have a reference name for your package.

Field.name: Package JSON
Field.comment: Eventuellt endast för basprojekt - innehåller färger från tema och annat från Title nivån. Dec 2020

Calculation.Text: Let ( [ // Step 1: Create the key values from title level theme_json = FAT Theme::Theme JSON; title_modifiers = "{" & Case ( ValueCount ( FAT ModifierValue @ Title::Value JSON ) = 0 ; "" ; Substitute ( List ( FAT ModifierValue @ Title::Value JSON ) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "" ) & "}"; title_json = JSONSetElement ( theme_json ; ["title" ; FAT Title::JSON friendly id ; JSONString ]; ["title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ; JSONString ]; ["client" ; FAT Title::Client id ; JSONString ]; ["base_project" ; FAT Title::Base project ; JSONString ]; ["title_header" ; FAT Title::Header txt id ; JSONString ]; //["quiddity_key" ; FAT Title::Funkis Cloud Session Key TEST ; JSONString ] ; ["original_language" ; FAT Title::Original language code ; JSONString] ; ["original_country" ; FAT Title::Original country code ; JSONString] ; ["original_localisation_code" ; FAT Title::Original localisation code ; JSONString]; ["installed_languages" ; ValueListToCommaList (FAT Title::Original localisation code;List (FAT Localisation @ Package::Stage enabled localisation code )); JSONString]; ["value_lists" ; "[" & Substitute ( List ( FAT List::List JSON ) ; ¶ ; ", ") & "]"; JSONArray]; ["ios" ; "[" & Substitute ( List ( FAT IO::IO JSON ) ; ¶ ; ", ") & "]"; JSONArray]; ["score_categories" ; "[" & Substitute ( List ( FAT Score variable::Score category JSON ) ; ¶ ; ", ") & "]"; JSONArray]; ["title_modifiers" ; title_modifiers ; JSONObject ] ); // Step 2: Create the the key values from package level. json1 = "{" & Case ( ValueCount ( FAT ModifierValue @ Package::Value JSON ) = 0 ; "" ; Substitute ( List ( FAT ModifierValue @ Package::Value JSON ) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "" ) & "}"; json3 = JSONSetElement ( json1 ; ["id" ; PrimaryKey ; JSONString ] ; ["backend" ; PrettifyDash(Case(FAT Package::Package Backend="Funkis Cloud"; "Quiddity"; FAT Package::Package Backend)) ; JSONString ]; ["context" ; Context ID ; JSONString ] ; ["friendly_id" ; JSON Friendly id ; JSONString ] ; ["type" ; "package" ; JSONString ] ; ["title_txt_id" ; Header txt id ; JSONString ] ; ["sub_title_1_txt_id" ; Sub header 1 txt id ; JSONString ] ; ["sub_title_2_txt_id" ; Sub header 2 txt id ; JSONString ] ; ["tags" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Tag Value @ PK::Tag Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]"; JSONArray ] ; ["number_of_links" ; Number of chapters ; JSONNumber ]; ["sort_index" ; SortIndex ; JSONNumber ]; ["hierarchy_level" ; 0 ; JSONNumber ]; ["program_type" ; PrettifyDash (Package type::Program type) ; JSONString ]; ["program_behaviour" ; PrettifyDash (Package type::Program behaviour) ; JSONString ]; ["usage_type" ; PrettifyDash (Usage type name) ; JSONString ] ) ]; //Step 3: Merge title level with package level. If any duplicates - package level will override title level. While ( // initial variables [ i=0 ; merge_json = json3; mergeKeys = JSONListKeys ( merge_json ; "" ) ; mergeValues = JSONListValues( merge_json ; "" ); // title_json must be declared again for the while scope! title_json = title_json ]; // condition i<ValueCount ( mergeKeys ) ; // logic [ i=i+1; valueType = JSONGetElementType ( merge_json ; GetValue ( mergeKeys ; i ) ); title_json = Case ( valueType = 1; JSONSetElement ( title_json ; GetValue ( mergeKeys ; i ); GetValue ( mergeValues ; i ); JSONString ); valueType = 2; JSONSetElement ( title_json ; GetValue ( mergeKeys ; i ); GetValue ( mergeValues ; i ); JSONNumber ); valueType = 3; JSONSetElement ( title_json ; GetValue ( mergeKeys ; i ); GetValue ( mergeValues ; i ); JSONObject ); valueType = 4; JSONSetElement ( title_json ; GetValue ( mergeKeys ; i ); GetValue ( mergeValues ; i ); JSONArray ) ) // end case ]; // result JSONFormatElements (title_json ) ) // End While ) // End Let

Field.name: FC Package directory
Field.comment: This is the name of the directory on Funkis Cloud. It is based on JSON Friendly id, which in turn is based on Reference name. Reference name can be changed without changing drirectory name.

Calculation.Text: "https://" & Title Server Preview::URL & "/" & Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Title::FC Client directory ) ; ""; FAT Title::FC Client directory & "/" ) & Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Title::FC Title directory ) ; ""; FAT Title::FC Title directory & "/" ) & Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Package::FC Package directory ) ; ""; FAT Package::FC Package directory & "/" ) /* Case ( IsEmpty (FC Package directory) ; FAT Title::OLD Sync Server Preview Path; //else FAT Title::OLD Sync Server Preview Path & FC Package directory & "/" ) */

Field.name: Export Package Sub Path
Field.comment: Should be replaced with FC Package directory instead for new titles

Calculation.Text: Case ( IsEmpty (FC Package directory) ; FAT Title::Export Title Sub Path; FAT Title::Export Title Sub Path & FC Package directory & "/" )

Case ( User X Title @ Title::Package Filepath JSON = "" ; User X Title @ Title::Title Filepath export & FC Package directory & "/"; JSONGetElement ( User X Title @ Title::Package Filepath JSON ; JSON Friendly id ) )

Field.name: Latest Exported file
Field.comment: Used as a temporary container with internal storage for export of JSON files

Field.name: Local export type
Field.comment: JSON, TEXT, Media all or Media update

Field.name: Funkis WOW Delivery
Field.comment: Select WOW delivery when building a downloadable package

Field.name: TextInContextualOrderTimeStamp
Field.comment: Timestamp that indicates when texts are arranged in the contextual order

Field.name: Package list JSON
Field.comment: Exported only for Package = Site. Exported in a separate JSON file.

Calculation.Text: Let ( [ json = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["package_id" ; PrimaryKey ; JSONString ]; ["friendly_id" ; JSON Friendly id; JSONString ]; ["sort_index" ; SortIndex; JSONNumber ]; ["package_type" ; Package type::Program type; JSONString ]; ["package_usage" ; Package type::Name; JSONString ]; ["full_path" ; Publish Server Package Full Path; JSONString ]; ["code_base" ; Baseproject Codebase @ Package::Name; JSONString ]; ["code_base_version" ; Baseproject Codebase Version @ Package::Version string; JSONString ]; ["reference_name" ; Reference name; JSONString ]; ["package_group_id" ; Package Group; JSONString ]; ["package_group_name" ; FAT Package Group @ Package::Name; JSONString ] ) ]; json )

Field.name: Description
Field.comment: Only for authors - not used in code.

Field.name: Preview Setting Clear storage
Field.comment: Deprecated - now using user specific settings on Title level (Feb 2023)

Calculation.Text: Let ( [ t0 = Reference name & "¶"; t1 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PK Header::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( TF PK Header::Display text ; Bold) & "¶"); t2 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PK Sub header 1::Text); ""; TextColor ( TF PK Sub header 1::Display text & "¶" ; RGB ( 128 ; 128 ; 128 ) )) & "¶"; cmt = Case(IsEmpty(Comment); ""; TextStyleAdd (TextSize ("Comment: "; 11); Bold+Italic) & TextStyleAdd (TextSize (Comment & "¶"; 11); Italic)) & "¶"; t12 = Case(Count(FAT ModifierValue @ Package::PrimaryKey) = 0; ""; TextStyleAdd ( "Modifier settings : ¶"; Bold) & List(FAT ModifierValue @ Package::Value JSON) & "¶¶") ]; t0 & t1 & t2 & cmt & t12 )

Field.name: Usage type id
Field.comment: How will this package be used. Member, Group, Session. Supports IO creation and settings.

Field.name: Launch from Funkis Cloud
Field.comment: This boolean defines if the package could be launched directly from Funkis Cloud. I.e Title site or a Trainers package.

Field.name: Package Backend
Field.comment: In som rare situations - the the Package is different than the Title backend

Calculation.Text: Case(Baseproject Codebase @ Package::Codebase type = "branch" Or Baseproject Codebase @ Package::Codebase type = "version"; Baseproject Codebase Version @ Package::FAT Version number; Baseproject Codebase @ Package::FAT Version number )

Field.name: Old PrimaryKey from clone
Field.comment: If item is cloned this id is used for reference in clone script

Field.name: Scroll skip page level
Field.comment: This setting affects the behaviour of FAT in scroll production with only one page per chapter

Field.name: gReadyStatus
Field.comment: Set to "Ready to use" at FAT startup. Used for Value Lists
